content.en:
After a long time, Ye Tian finally completed the breakthrough.

At this moment, his domain body had already stepped from the elite domain body level to the top domain body level, and his cultivation had reached the top domain ancestor realm.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than in the past.

Now, when an ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor fights against him, he can easily kill it in an instant, even if it is some very powerful Supreme Domain Ancestor, they are not his opponents.

Of course, the kind of strong man who used to be a holy son, and now he has cultivated to the peak realm of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, he is probably not an opponent, unless he can cultivate a holy technique to the extreme realm, or improve his cultivation to the peak realm of the top domain body, then he can be sure to compete with such a Supreme Domain Ancestor.

It was naturally very difficult to cultivate the Holy Technique to the extreme realm, but it was not too difficult to raise the cultivation to the peak realm of the top domain body.

After all, Ye Tian still had the ancestral medicine in his hand, and with the ancestral medicine, he could easily raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the top domain ancestor.

So, Ye Tian continued to retreat and absorb the refining ancestral medicine.

Hundreds of thousands of years later, with the help of the energy of the ancestral medicine, Ye Tian finally refined the top domain body to the peak realm, and his cultivation also reached the peak realm of the top domain ancestor.

At this time, Ye Tian's own strength was enough to rival those top Supreme Domain Ancestors, and if he used the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, he could even suppress those more demonic Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Of course.

If the many Supreme Domain Ancestors combined, he still couldn't stop it.

However, he has the battle gate as a backer, so he is not worried.

Originally, Ye Tian thought that it would take a long time for the Soul Saint Realm Flower of the Soul Saint Realm to be born, but on this day, the origin of the Xuanxu Saint Realm had increased again.

Almost every once in a while, the Creation Mixed Yuan Well would cause the origin of the Xuanxu Saint Realm to skyrocket, but it couldn't be seen on the surface.

After all, if the Xuanxu Saint Realm did not evolve into the Ancestral Realm again, no matter how much the origin skyrocketed, the Xuanxu Saint Realm would still be so big.

However, due to the skyrocketing of the origin of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, the speed of the birth of resources in the Xuanxu Holy Realm has accelerated a lot, and I am afraid that many extremely precious resources will be born in the future.

And the origin of the Soul Saint Realm naturally skyrocketed, resulting in the birth of the Soul Saint Realm Flower naturally much faster.

this day.

The Soul Saint Realm Flower is born!

......

Within the Soul Saint Realm, many domain ancestors are refining their souls with the help of the Soul Saint Realm.

Abrupt.

A unique wave was transmitted, causing all the Domain Ancestor souls to tremble, and they all looked at the central area of the Soul Saint Realm.

Whew!!!

A Domain Ancestor quickly rushed towards the center of the Soul Saint Realm.

However, the domain ancestors with lower strength could not enter the central position of the Soul Saint Realm, their souls could not withstand the impact of the black shadow, and if they forcibly entered there, they would be directly crushed to death by crushing their souls.

Of course, if the top domain ancestor casts the Defensive Soul Secret Technique plus some soul domain weapons, he can still resist the impact of the black shadow.

The domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, plus a few domain ancestors of other forces, came to the central area of the Soul Saint Realm one after another.

Here, they saw the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

At this time, it had not been long since the Soul Saint Realm Flower had just been conceived, and it would take some time for it to fully grow.

There were countless black shadows near the Soul Saint Realm Flower, some of which were very large, like a mountain.

This kind of black shadow like a mountain can't be stopped even by an ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor.

And so many black shadows surrounded the Soul Saint Realm Flower, almost enveloping it.

If anyone dared to pick the Soul Saint Realm flower, they would definitely withstand the impact of these countless shadows, and I am afraid that even the top Supreme Domain Ancestor would also be instantly torn apart by countless black shadows and die.

Of course.

The top domain ancestors didn't dare to pick the Soul Saint Realm flower, but the strongest domain ancestors had a way to pick the Soul Saint Realm flower.

Not long after, Ye Tian came.

After all, when a treasure like the Soul Saint Realm Flower was born, it was naturally impossible for him not to appear.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian appeared, and everyone's eyes looked at Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, the Soul Saint Realm Flower is of great use to me, I want to buy it, can I?"

The True Spirit Domain Ancestor spoke.

"True Spirit Domain Ancestor, the Soul Saint Realm Flower can create an invincible Domain Ancestor, do you think I will sell it to you? It was born in my Soul Saint Realm, it naturally belongs to me, I hope you don't snatch it, otherwise it will offend me!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

These domain ancestors of the Battle Gate really wanted the Soul Saint Realm Flower, but after all, this flower belonged to Ye Tian, and if they snatched it, they would undoubtedly offend Ye Tian.

But if you choose not to snatch it, then this opportunity will be lost!

Some of the Domain Ancestors who felt that there was little hope of snatching the Soul Saint Realm Flower shook their heads and chose to give up.

But the True Spirit Domain Ancestor, a supreme domain ancestor with earth-shattering combat power, was a little unwilling.

As for offending Ye Tian, he didn't really worry about anything.

If he really snatched the Soul Saint Realm Flower and became an invincible domain ancestor in the future, he would offend Ye Tian and offend him, and he was still afraid that Ye Tian would kill him in the future?

Ye Tian is talented and evil, but he also has a backer!

Of course, in this situation, he will not directly say it.

When the time comes, if there is any hope of snatching the Soul Saint Realm Flower, he will still make a move.

At this time, another Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Hundred Leng Domain Ancestor, spoke: "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, you also know very well the preciousness of the Soul Saint Realm Flower, and you can't keep it at all with you alone. If I auction the Soul Saint Realm Flower to us, the one with the highest price will get it, and then we will work together to help you resist the strongest domain ancestors of other forces. Otherwise, with so many Supreme Domain Ancestors attacking, we may not be able to keep this Soul Saint Realm flower!"

The Hundred Leng Domain Ancestor was also a Holy Son at the beginning, and his strength was second only to the True Spirit Domain Ancestor.

At this time, the words of the Hundred Leng Domain Ancestor showed that if Ye Tian was unwilling to sell the Soul Saint Realm Flower, then they would not do their best to keep the Soul Saint Realm Flower, and when the time came, they were afraid that they would release water.

In that case, with Ye Tian's strength, he would not be able to keep the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

"Everyone, I don't ask you to block the attacks of other Supreme Domain Ancestors, but if anyone participates in the robbery, they will not be allowed to enter my Soul Saint Realm to cultivate, or even enter the Xuanxu Saint Realm!"

Ye Tian reminded.

However, the Baileng Domain Ancestor and the True Spirit Domain Ancestor and the others didn't seem to care too much about Ye Tian's threat.

In fact, although they were afraid of Ye Tian, they were not afraid of Ye Tian.

There are also many factions in the battle gate, and they are also in competition with each other.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's good luck and occupying the Xuanxu Saint Realm, plus Ye Tian's identity was not ordinary, otherwise they would have banned Ye Tian's status and occupied this Saint Realm a long time ago.

The Soul Saint Realm Flower was too precious, if they really snatched it, it didn't matter if they never entered the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Therefore, Ye Tian's threat was nothing to them.

Ye Tian glanced at the many domain ancestors of the Battle Gate and some of the domain ancestors of other forces, and knew very well in his heart that many domain ancestors here were afraid that they would make a move.

But he didn't care.

Unless all the domain ancestors made a move, he could suppress them with the power of these domain ancestors alone.

Ye Tian did not leave the Soul Saint Realm, but sat cross-legged here, using the black shadow to refine his soul while waiting for the Soul Saint Realm flower to completely mature.
